action: Save the singing script, avatar details, conv_id, and metadata including song theme, generation timestamp, and expiry timestamp (+3 hours) for later retrieval and tracking.
fallback_action: If saving the data fails, retry saving automatically and alert the system agent if repeated failures occur.

recipe.steps: Retrieve the latest singing script, selected avatar_id, video generation conv_id, and associated metadata from saved memory or recent actions.
Calculate the expiry timestamp by adding 3 hours to the video generation timestamp.
Save the singing script, avatar details, conv_id, song theme, generation timestamp, and expiry timestamp under a structured key using the save_data_in_memory tool for future retrieval.
